recipes.name: Simplest Manifest - Single Image File
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Renders the image correctly using Mango's default ImageRenderer and OpenSeadragon.

recipes.name: Simplest Manifest - Audio
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Audio content is resolved and played using the custom AudioRenderer component.

recipes.name: Simplest Manifest - Video
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Video files are played using the custom HTML5 VideoRenderer with full controls.

recipes.name: Support Deep Viewing with Basic Use of a IIIF Image Service
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Integrates with standard IIIF Image API services (v2 and v3) via OpenSeadragon for multi-tile deep zoom.

recipes.name: Internationalization and Multi-language Values (label, summary, metadata, requiredStatement)
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Handles IIIF language maps, selecting the active locale (English, French, Spanish, Welsh) dynamically.

recipes.name: Simple Manifest - Book
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Displays sequential canvas thumbnails and permits navigating through multiple image canvases.

recipes.name: HTML in Annotations
recipes.notes: Fully supported. HTML annotations targeting canvases are parsed and rendered correctly as interactive overlays.

recipes.name: Simple Collection
recipes.notes: Mango resolves single manifests; viewing collections hierarchically is not supported.

recipes.name: CSS in an Annotation
recipes.notes: Fully supported. CSS rules and classes embedded in stylesheets are respected when rendering HTML annotations.

recipes.name: Missing Images in a Sequence
recipes.notes: Contains a bug where the selecting the missing image breaks the viewer.

recipes.name: Addressing a Spatial Region
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Grouping Annotations into Collections
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Image in Annotations
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Renders static or service-based images inside HTML annotations.

recipes.name: Multiple Choice of Audio Formats in a Single View (Canvas)
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Embedding HTML in descriptive properties (label, summary, metadata, requiredStatement)
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Sanitizes and renders basic HTML formatting inside labels, summaries, and metadata lists.

recipes.name: Rights statement (rights, requiredStatement)
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Parses the rights field and displays the license details in the metadata panel.

recipes.name: Viewing direction and Its Effect on Navigation (viewingDirection)
recipes.notes: Mango parses viewingDirection (e.g. right-to-left), but manual layout toggling is required; it does not automatically re-orient layouts dynamically.

recipes.name: Book 'behavior' Variations (continuous, individuals) (behaviorimage)
recipes.notes: Supports individual page views, but continuous page layouts are basic.

recipes.name: Load a Preview Image Before the Main Content (placeholderCanvas)
recipes.notes: Parses placeholderCanvas and displays it during loading, but does not implement advanced multi-stage loading or crossfades.

recipes.name: Audio Presentation with Accompanying Image (accompanyingCanvas)
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Begin playback at a specific point - Time-based media (start)
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Respects the start property and begins playback of time-based media at the specified timestamp.

recipes.name: Metadata on any Resource (metadata)
recipes.notes: Does not display all fields in manifest.

recipes.name: Linking to Web Page of an Object (homepage)
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Linking to Structured Metadata (seeAlso)
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Image Thumbnail for Manifest (thumbnail)
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Displaying Multiple Values with Language Maps (label, summary, metadata, requiredStatement)
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Handles multiple localized entries and lets the user toggle active language displays.

recipes.name: Load Manifest Beginning with a Specific Canvas (start)
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Navigation by Chronology (navDate)
recipes.notes: Mango does not have a timeline navigator UI for chronologically sorting/browsing canvases.

recipes.name: Acknowledge Content Contributors (provider)
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Table of Contents for Book Chapters (structures)
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Table of Contents for A/V Content
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Renders ranges as clickable video/audio chapters that seek to the specific start times during playback.

recipes.name: Alternative Page Sequences
recipes.notes: Multiple sequences are parsed, but the sequence browser interface is simple.

recipes.name: Multi-volume Work with Individually-bound Volumes
recipes.notes: Collections are currently not supported; only individual manifests can be loaded.

recipes.name: Multiple Volumes in a Single Bound Volume
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Handled via chapter/ranges pointing to canvases within the same manifest.

recipes.name: Multiple Choice of Images in a Single View (Canvas)
recipes.notes: Toggling between alternative image layers (the choice property) is not natively supported inside OpenSeadragon.

recipes.name: Foldouts, Flaps, and Maps (behavior)
recipes.notes: Renders these as separate canvases, but layout presets for overlapping foldouts or flaps are not automated.

recipes.name: Composition from Multiple Images
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Adding Thumbnail Navigation and no-nav to a Video Resource
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Video thumbnail tracks are fully displayed, and controls obey behaviors.

recipes.name: Image and Canvas with Differing Dimensions
recipes.notes: Fully supported. OpenSeadragon automatically scales and fits image coordinates to differing canvas aspect ratios.

recipes.name: Image Rotation Two Ways
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Supports 90/180/270 degree rotation services on canvas images.

recipes.name: Providing Access to Transcript Files of A/V Content (rendering)
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Table of Contents for Multiple A/V Files on a Single Canvas (start)
recipes.notes: Plays multiple files sequentially, but sub-chapter duration mapping has minor sync issues.

recipes.name: Table of Contents for Multiple A/V Files on Multiple Canvases
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Using Caption and Subtitle Files in Multiple Languages with Video Content
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Scholarly Annotation of a Poetry Reading
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Annotations with temporal targets are displayed in sync with audio playback. Does not display all possible annotations.

recipes.name: Using Caption and Subtitle Files with Video Content
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Annotating a specific point of an image
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Renders HTML/SVG point markers precisely on the zoomable image canvas.

recipes.name: Simple Annotation — Tagging
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Text annotation tags are resolved and listed inside the annotations sidebar panel.

recipes.name: Redirecting from one Canvas to another resource (Hotspot linking)
recipes.notes: Hotspot annotation links targeting other canvases or external web resources do not automatically trigger redirection.

recipes.name: Tagging with an External Resource
recipes.notes: Data is displayed but links not clickable.

recipes.name: Annotation with a Non-Rectangular Polygon
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Renders complex polygon paths over the OpenSeadragon viewport via SVG overlay.

recipes.name: Simplest Annotation
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Full canvas comment annotations are listed in the side drawer.

recipes.name: Embedded or referenced Annotations
recipes.notes: Example manifest not working.

recipes.name: Linking external Annotations targeting a Canvas to a Manifest
recipes.notes: Example manifest not working.

recipes.name: Annotate specific images or layers
recipes.notes: Annotation not appearing.

recipes.name: Annotating in Multiple Languages
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Rendering Multiple Media Types on a Time-Based Canvas
recipes.notes: Audio and video play, but complex layout grids overlapping on a single timeline have minor presentation issues.

recipes.name: Sharing a link to open a Manifest in a specific viewer
recipes.notes: Not yet supported.

recipes.name: Open a specific region of a Canvas in a viewer
recipes.notes: Example manifest not working.

recipes.name: Sharing a link for opening two or more Canvases
recipes.notes: Opens the target canvases, but custom dual-panel layout setups are basic.

recipes.name: Drag and Drop
recipes.notes: Fully supported. Users can drag and drop IIIF manifest URLs/files directly to load them.

recipes.name: Represent Canvas Fragment as a Geographic Area in a Web Mapping Client
recipes.notes: Geographic coordinate parsing and map layer integrations are not supported.

recipes.name: Locate a Manifest on a Web Map
recipes.notes: Geographic location markers using navPlace are not displayed.

recipes.name: Locate Multiple Canvases on a Web Map
recipes.notes: Geographic metadata (navPlace on canvases) is not integrated with a web map.

recipes.name: Locating an Item in Place and Time
recipes.notes: Combined geographic (navPlace) and temporal (navDate) mapping views are not supported.
